title: Parking
description: One secure basement car space included with your stay. Space number will be provided on check-in. Remote control located in apartment. Height clearance 2.1m. No parking in visitor bays - strictly enforced by body corporate.

title: Uber & Taxis
description: Uber and DiDi are readily available throughout the Gold Coast. Local taxi service: 131 008.

title: G:link Light Rail
description: The G:link light rail stops at Broadbeach South station, just a 3-minute walk from the apartment. The tram connects Broadbeach to Surfers Paradise, Southport, and Helensvale (with train connections to Brisbane).
additionalInfo: Trams run approximately every 7-15 minutes during peak times. For timetables and real-time updates, visit the TransLink website or download the MyTransLink app. Go Card is the easiest way to pay. Adult fares start from $3.31 for a single journey. Paper tickets also available from station machines.

title: Gold Coast Airport Transfers
description: Gold Coast Airport (Coolangatta) is approximately 25km south of Broadbeach. Con-X-ion Airport Shuttle: 1300 266 946 (Shared shuttle service). Uber/DiDi: Approximately $40-50 to Broadbeach.
additionalInfo: Allow 30-40 minutes travel time depending on traffic.

title: Car Rental
description: While Broadbeach is very walkable with excellent public transport, a car is useful for exploring the wider Gold Coast region, hinterland, and theme parks.
additionalInfo: Major rental companies have desks at Gold Coast Airport and in Surfers Paradise. Book in advance for better rates.
